headline: Lucid Falls 5%: New CEO and Uber Deal Can’t Override Investor Fears Over Dilution and Production
summary: Lucid Group (NASDAQ:LCID) stock is down 5% in midday trading Friday, sliding from $7.70 to $7.28 even as the broader market climbs. This is happening even while S&P 500 is up by 1.33% on the session. When a stock falls against a rising tape, the selling pressure is company-specific, not macro-driven. Lucid has positive headlines: ... Lucid Falls 5%: New CEO and Uber Deal Can’t Override Investor Fears Over Dilution and Production

headline: Uber Bets on Europe as Delivery Hero's Clock Ticks
summary: This article first appeared on GuruFocus.  Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) rose 0.54% in premarket trading after the company agreed to acquire an additional 4.5% stake in Delivery Hero for approximately 270 million, buying the shares at 20 each from Prosus, the Dutch investment group and Delivery Hero's largest shareholder.  Uber described the deal as "opportunistic."

headline: Uber Takes Stake In Delivery Hero From Prosus
summary: Uber (NYSE:UBER) is making a subtle move in the delivery space, picking up a 4.5% stake in Delivery Hero as Prosus trims its position.  Prosus sold around 13.6 million shares at 20 each, bringing in roughly 270 million and lowering its stake in Delivery Hero from 26.3% to 21.8%.  For Uber, this is less about control and more about getting exposure to another major player in the global delivery market without making a full acquisition.

headline: Uber Deepens Delivery Hero Ties As Robotaxi Spend Reshapes Investor View
summary: Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) has acquired an additional 4.5% stake in Delivery Hero, taking its holding to around 7%. The deal is a material cross-border investment in the food delivery sector between a leading US platform and a major European peer. This transaction comes alongside Uber's commitment of more than US$10 billion to robotaxi and autonomous vehicle expansion. For investors watching NYSE:UBER, this move adds another piece to a business that already spans ride hailing, food...
